name: Choo Chiang Holdings Ltd.
summary: Choo Chiang Holdings Ltd., an investment holding company, engages in the retail and distribution of electrical products and accessories in Singapore. It operates through two segments, Distribution Business and Property Investment Business. The company offers electrical cables and cable accessories; light switches, circuit breakers, and accessories; lightning accessories; trunking and pipe products; air-conditioner accessories; light fixtures and accessories; ventilating, wall-mounted, and ceiling fans; and power drills and handheld tools. It also provides electrical products and accessories under the CCM and CRM brands. In addition, the company is involved in the assembly of lighting fittings and fixtures; and property investment and real estate management activities. It offers its products for residential and industrial use through 10 retail branches. The company was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Singapore. Choo Chiang Holdings Ltd. is a subsidiary of TL Investment Holdings Pte. Ltd.
